title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 543.210 - Jury — number — selection
text:
543.210.  Jury — number — selection. — If the case is thereafter tried before an associate circuit judge, the jury shall be composed of twelve persons, unless a less number shall be agreed upon, but not less than six.  The selection of the jury and the practice and procedure relative to the jury in a case tried before an associate circuit judge shall be the same as in a case tried before a circuit judge except as otherwise provided herein.
(RSMo 1939 § 3826, A.L. 1945 p. 750 § 21, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3436; 1919 § 3781; 1909 § 4989 
Effective 1-02-79
